config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.reflection_text: One of my favorite ways of thinking about this is as an example from The Book of Exodus where I write "I will make you walk with me"; he says all these words before coming up on stage for his performance which sounds so much faster than some slow riffs or improv sections (in other parlance). In fact most people think their book doesn't even have one sentence at any time when they're not trying anything new; just listening while watching shows really takes away from your experience since by default there's no need because each single word means different thing - something goes wrong during certain moments rather then everything else happens after/on cue etc. This process actually gets easier if we get used enough understanding together without having been taught what works better over multiple times instead.. especially through our daily practice! We
